app.title: GreenWatts
view.coming_soon: Moving here from Settings next cycle — content unchanged, just relocating.
gpu.no_response: GPU dropped from PCIe bus — driver not responding (nvidia-smi silent, OcuLink link probably down)
pcierec.wrapper_missing: The sudoers wrapper is not installed. Executable steps will not work until you run:
pcierec.run_all_help: Runs the 4 guest steps in order, stops as soon as the link comes back. Asks once if some steps kill workloads.
pcierec.install_explain: A one-time root step is required. Enter your sudo password to install now, or copy the command to run in a terminal.
history.title: Historical metrics
history.description: Stored locally in SQLite at ~/.local/share/gpu-dashboard/metrics.db. Retention is 30 days by default (configurable via STORAGE_RETENTION_DAYS).
history.no_data: No data for this range. Buffer fills as samples are collected (one every 5s).
history.events_legend: Events: 🔴 drop · 🟢 recover · 🔵 power-limit · 🟣 offsets · 🟡 alert
heatmap.title: Power cost by hour of day
heatmap.description: Average watts at each hour over the last {days} days. Color intensity = €/h.
heatmap.no_data: No data yet — heatmap fills as samples accumulate over multiple days.
setup.welcome_intro: This setup wizard configures the dashboard for your machine. It only writes to your home folder — sudo commands you may need to run are shown explicitly, never executed silently.
setup.modules_intro: Only the modules supported by your hardware are enabled by default. You can change this later.
setup.sudo_intro: Some modules need root to install a wrapper script or a config file. Copy-paste these in a terminal, then click 'Recheck'.
setup.llm_mode_description: Pick what this rig is mostly used for. You can change this later in config.env.
setup.llm_mode_standard_desc: Hardware metrics only. No LLM-specific cards.
setup.llm_mode_llm_desc: Adds tokens/s, lifetime tokens, tok/W efficiency.
setup.llm_url_hint: Default ollama: http://127.0.0.1:11434 · Default llama.cpp: http://127.0.0.1:8080
setup.done_intro: Configuration saved to ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/config.env. Restart the dashboard to apply:
setup.done_restart_hint: Ctrl+C in the terminal where you launched it, then re-run `python3 -m gpu_dashboard`.
services.restart_description: Reloads config + reconnects to nvidia-smi. The page will reload automatically after ~2 seconds.
services.restart_confirm: Restart the gpu-dashboard server? The page will be unavailable for ~2 seconds.
fancurve.title: Fan curve
fancurve.description: Current fan curve : temp (°C) → fan target (%). Set via FAN_CURVE_POINTS or GPU profile. Drag-edit coming in next cycles.
fancurve.readonly_hint: Read-only viewer (slice 1/8). Drag handles to edit + save coming in cycles 93-95.
fancurve.description_editable: Drag the control points to reshape. Reset undoes local changes. Persist via Save (coming in cycle 95).
fancurve.save_hint: Drag points to edit. Save to disk arrives in cycle 95.
fancurve.edit_hint: Drag = move · Double-click empty = add · Right-click = delete (min 2)
fancurve.min_points_warning: Cannot delete : minimum 2 control points required.
fancurve.preset_silent_desc: Lower fan rpm at every temp — quietest, accepts higher GPU temps
fancurve.preset_balanced_desc: Default curve — moderate noise + moderate temps
fancurve.preset_aggressive_desc: Spin up earlier and harder — coolest GPU, loudest
fancurve.keyboard_hint: Selected point — Arrows nudge ±1 (Shift ±5) · Tab = next · Delete = remove · ESC = deselect
fancurve.hysteresis_hint: Prevents fans from cycling when temperature hovers near a curve breakpoint. Ramp-down of % is delayed (ramp-up stays immediate for safety). Two conditions unblock ramp-down : enough time elapsed OR temperature dropped enough.
about.title: About gpu-dashboard
about.tagline: Lightweight NVIDIA GPU monitoring + tuning for Linux. Built for LLM rigs and eGPU/OcuLink setups.
services.redo_wizard_description: Useful if you want to enable a module you skipped, change ports, or update the Telegram config. Your current config.env is overwritten when you save at the end.
services.stop_confirm: Stop the gpu-dashboard server? It won't restart automatically — you'll need to relaunch it manually (or systemd will if it's a service).
services.stopped: Server stopped. Restart manually with: python3 -m gpu_dashboard
services.snapshot_description: Download a tar.gz bundle of config.env + secrets.env + metrics.db. Use it for backup or to migrate to another machine — extract into the same paths and restart.
services.update_description: Fetches the latest commits from GitHub and shows how many you are behind. Pull + restart applies them in one click. Won't touch a dirty working tree.
services.update_unknown: No upstream tracking — manual git setup
services.update_dirty: Uncommitted changes detected — refusing to pull
integrations.title: Integrations — watchdog · services · HF cache
integrations.description: Toggle the auto-restart watchdog, see what GPU/LLM services are running on the box, and audit the Hugging Face cache for cold model files.
integrations.watchdog.title: 🐕 Auto-restart watchdog
integrations.watchdog.desc: Installs a systemd user timer that polls /readyz every 60 s and restarts gpu-dashboard if any subsystem fails (NVML, SQLite, sampler).
integrations.watchdog.strict: Strict mode (also fail on ECC + driver drift)
integrations.services.title: 🔍 Detected services
integrations.services.desc: Auto-detects Ollama, llama.cpp server, vLLM, ComfyUI, ChromaDB, Qdrant, Triton, JupyterLab and others on this host.
integrations.services.none: No known service detected on listening ports.
integrations.hf.title: 🧹 HF cache janitor
integrations.hf.desc: Scans ~/.cache/huggingface, Ollama, llama.cpp and configured models dirs for large stale model files. Read-only — never deletes.
integrations.notif.title: 🔔 Notification channels
integrations.notif.desc: Multi-channel alerting — Discord, Slack, ntfy, Pushover, Gotify, generic webhook, SMTP. Each channel filters by min level, GPU index, and quiet hours.
integrations.notif.name: Name
integrations.auth.title: 🔐 Auth tokens & share-links
integrations.auth.desc: Optional HMAC bearer tokens for API access + signed share-links for read-only dashboard sharing. Not enforced on existing routes (opt-in).
integrations.auth.name: Name
integrations.auth.secret_shown_once: ⚠️ Copy this secret now — it will NEVER be shown again
integrations.disk.title: 💾 Disk health (SMART)
integrations.disk.desc: smartctl-based health audit for NVMe + SATA disks. Catches dying SSDs that slow model loading.
integrations.disk.none: smartctl not installed or no disks detected.
integrations.airgap.title: 🌐 Air-gap mode
integrations.airgap.desc: Disable outbound network requests (HF Hub, GitHub, Telegram, webhooks). Loopback always allowed.
integrations.airgap.status_off: Air-gap OFF — all outbound traffic allowed
integrations.airgap.note: To toggle, set AIRGAP_MODE=1 in ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/config.env then restart the service.
integrations.wall.title: 🔌 Wall-meter (smart plug)
integrations.wall.desc: Read actual PSU draw from a Shelly / Tasmota smart plug. Compute PSU efficiency vs nvidia-smi.
integrations.wall.not_configured: Not configured. Set WALL_METER_URL + WALL_METER_KIND in config.env.
integrations.peers.title: 🌍 LAN peers (fleet)
integrations.peers.desc: Other gpu-dashboard instances discovered on this broadcast domain via UDP beacon.
integrations.peers.none: No peers yet. Enable PEER_BEACON_ENABLED=1 + restart on each rig.
integrations.wizard.title: 🌡️ Hot-GPU diagnostic wizard
integrations.wizard.desc: Step-through 5-check decision tree : ambient · fan curve · dust suspect · driver age · throttle history. Aggregated verdict with actionable fixes.
integrations.vram.title: 🛡️ VRAM quota enforcer
integrations.vram.desc: Per-process VRAM budget rules. Dry-run by default. Audit log records every breach.
integrations.vram.no_rules: No rules configured. Edit ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/vram_quota.json to add some.
integrations.carbon.title: 🌱 Carbon intensity
integrations.carbon.desc: Multiplies live power × user-supplied grid carbon intensity (CSV). Air-gap-safe : reads ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/grid_intensity.csv.
integrations.carbon.not_configured: No CSV at ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/grid_intensity.csv. Add hourly rows (hour,gCO2/kWh) to enable.
integrations.bestgpu.title: ⚖️ Best-GPU selector
integrations.bestgpu.desc: Computes a score per GPU (lower = better) for multi-GPU rigs. Returns a CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES suggestion ready to paste into your shell.
integrations.xid.title: 💥 Xid kernel-error log
integrations.xid.desc: Parses dmesg / journalctl for NVRM Xid events. Bundled dictionary translates code → cause + severity + remediation.
integrations.xid.none: No Xid events in last 24h — your GPU is happy.
integrations.hotswap.title: 🔌 Hot-swap / cable drift
integrations.hotswap.desc: Detects PCIe link downgrades, power-state flaps, and display-cable disconnects. Useful for OcuLink / eGPU rigs.
integrations.cost.title: 💰 Inference cost
integrations.cost.desc: Marginal energy cost of LLM inference. Joins token deltas with integrated power × time × price.
integrations.cost.headline: Headline tok/Wh (1h)
integrations.usage.title: 👥 Per-user lab usage
integrations.usage.desc: Attributes GPU + VRAM + watts to Linux users on shared boxes. Add aliases at ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/users.allow (uid=name).
integrations.usage.no_users: No active GPU users right now.
integrations.boot.title: 🚀 Boot profile
integrations.boot.desc: Apply persisted power-limit / persistence-mode shortly after boot. Pairs with the systemd unit at docs/systemd/gpu-dashboard-boot-profile.service.
integrations.tariff.title: 💰 Time-of-use tariff
integrations.tariff.desc: Reads ~/.config/gpu-dashboard/tariffs.csv (hour,€/kWh). Highlights cheap/peak windows + suggests the cheapest start time for a job.
integrations.dedup.title: 🪞 HF cache dedup
integrations.dedup.desc: Finds same-content blobs in HF/Ollama/llama.cpp caches and replaces duplicates with hardlinks. Read-only by default.
integrations.discord.title: 🎮 Discord Rich Presence
integrations.discord.desc: Pushes live GPU + LLM state to your Discord status via local IPC pipe. Air-gap-safe (no outbound calls — Discord client does it).
integrations.discord.no_discord: Discord IPC socket not found — start Discord client.
integrations.discord.no_app_id: Set DISCORD_APP_ID in config.env (create at discord.com/developers).
integrations.discord.ready: Ready — DISCORD_RPC_ENABLED=1 + restart to start bridge
integrations.noc.title: 📺 NOC board
integrations.noc.desc: Wall-mounted status display with oversized tiles, color-coded GPU state. Designed for big screens (3-5 m viewing distance).
integrations.dr.title: 💾 DR (disaster recovery) bundle
integrations.dr.desc: Single tarball with SQLite snapshot + all configs + restore.sh. Reproducible self-host recovery in ~5 minutes.
integrations.lmstudio.title: 🪞 LM-Studio inventory
integrations.lmstudio.desc: Scans ~/.lmstudio/models/ for GGUFs, cross-refs with HF cache to flag duplicates wasting disk.
integrations.lmstudio.no_lmstudio: LM-Studio not installed at the default path.
integrations.driver.title: ⏪ Driver vault (rollback)
integrations.driver.desc: Caches recent NVIDIA driver .deb files so you can roll back when an apt upgrade introduces a regression. Generates sudo script — never auto-runs.
integrations.driver.vault_empty: No vaulted .deb files yet. Run 'Stash current driver' shortly after each apt upgrade.
integrations.llmswap.title: 🔀 LLM hot-swap orchestrator
integrations.llmswap.desc: Polls Ollama /api/ps and llama-server /v1/models to track what's actually loaded in VRAM. Pin models you want to keep, see a swap timeline, preview an LRU + size-aware eviction before you swap.
integrations.llmswap.none: No model loaded right now. Start a generation in Ollama or llama-server, then come back.
integrations.llmswap.no_events: No load / unload events recorded yet.
integrations.llmswap.suggest_sufficient: Evicting these would free {gib} GiB — enough.
integrations.llmswap.suggest_insufficien: Cannot free enough. Pinned or empty-VRAM models block more.
integrations.cudaadvisor.title: 🔎 CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES advisor
integrations.cudaadvisor.desc: After a driver upgrade or PCIe reorder, processes pinned to an integer GPU index may silently target the wrong physical card. Scans /proc/<pid>/environ and resolves each entry against the current index→UUID map.
integrations.nvmeswap.title: 💾 NVMe-as-VRAM-swap monitor
integrations.nvmeswap.desc: When llama.cpp / Ollama / vLLM hit VRAM pressure, they mmap-swap to NVMe and silently shred SSD endurance. Surfaces LLM-process swap usage, NVMe write rate, and TBW projection.
integrations.nvmeswap.no_nvme: No NVMe device on this system.
integrations.nvmeswap.days_remaining: days left at current write rate
integrations.cudamatrix.title: 🧬 CUDA / cuDNN / driver matrix
integrations.cudamatrix.desc: Reads driver (nvidia-smi), CUDA toolkit (version.json), cuDNN (header) and compares against NVIDIA's minimum-driver-per-CUDA table. The single biggest support question, answered in one card.
integrations.pciehist.title: 📊 PCIe link-state thrasher
integrations.pciehist.desc: Aggregates PCIe renegotiation events into a histogram. Flags Gen3 ↔ Gen4 flapping under load (typical of OcuLink cable issues).
integrations.throttle.title: 🌡 Throttle root-cause classifier
integrations.throttle.desc: Reads NVIDIA's throttle reason bitmask and pairs it with the current power/temp/clock state to answer 'why is my GPU slow?' in one line.
integrations.mps.title: 🧩 CUDA-MPS daemon health
integrations.mps.desc: CUDA MPS lets several processes share one GPU. Its failures are silent. Reports state (not_configured / not_running / running / stalled) plus client list + per-client SM share.
integrations.nice.title: ⚖ GPU process nice / ionice advisor
integrations.nice.desc: On mixed workload boxes (gaming + LLM + Blender on the same GPU), all processes default to nice 0. Recommends a renice value per CUDA process based on classification.
integrations.warmup.title: 🚀 Per-model warm-up profiler
integrations.warmup.desc: Records cold→hot first-token-latency (TTFT) per model. Use it to justify pinning a model in VRAM vs evicting.
integrations.warmup.none: No models profiled yet. Click 'Probe' to seed a sample.
integrations.suspend.title: 🛏 Suspend safety preflight
integrations.suspend.desc: The driver does not always restore CUDA contexts cleanly across suspend. Mid-training laptops can corrupt VRAM or hang at next boot. This card checks what's in-flight and emits a sudo-free `systemd-inhibit` snippet for long jobs.
integrations.containers.title: 🐳 Container GPU audit
integrations.containers.desc: Talks to the Docker daemon socket and reports per-container GPU visibility. Catches the 'why is Ollama on CPU?' bug in one screenshot.
integrations.ups.title: 🔋 UPS runtime estimator
integrations.ups.desc: Adjusts the UPS battery.runtime estimate against current GPU power draw. Returns a 'pause now / shutdown now' verdict instead of raw seconds.
integrations.vbios.title: 🧠 VBIOS drift tracker
integrations.vbios.desc: Records a vbios_version + ROM sha256 baseline per GPU on first observation. Flags drift after a flash. Useful for used-card resale audit and detecting silent driver-triggered re-flash.
integrations.pstate.title: ⚙ P-state pinning advisor
integrations.pstate.desc: Reads NVIDIA performance state (P0-P15) and pairs it with current load. Catches the R555+ open driver silent P2-downshift bug + clocks locked by stale --lock-gpu-clocks calls.
integrations.persistence.title: 🪪 nvidia-persistenced check
integrations.persistence.desc: Most distros ship the persistence daemon disabled. Without it, every fresh CUDA process pays ~2-3 s cold-start tax (Ollama, vLLM, Triton). Reports daemon + per-GPU state with a one-line systemctl fix.
integrations.gsp.title: 🧬 GSP-RM crash surfacer
integrations.gsp.desc: R555+ open kernel driver runs the resource manager inside the GSP firmware. Silent fallback to legacy host RM means missing MIG/MPS and ~5-10% perf loss. Scans journald for GSP crash/timeout/fallback events.
integrations.sdcache.title: 🎨 SD / ComfyUI cache janitor
integrations.sdcache.desc: Read-only audit of Stable-Diffusion, ComfyUI, Fooocus, InvokeAI and SwarmUI install paths. Surfaces stale models / outputs (>30 d) that you can delete to reclaim disk.
integrations.leak.title: 💧 Per-process VRAM leak detector
integrations.leak.desc: Samples per-PID VRAM usage and fits a linear trend. Flags processes leaking >50 MiB/h or >5%/h of their own footprint, with projected OOM time at the current rate.
integrations.reset.title: 🔁 GPU reset counter
integrations.reset.desc: Reads /sys/class/drm/card*/device/reset_count and journalctl for 'GPU fallen off bus' / 'GPU has been reset'. Three resets in a week = likely RMA candidate.
integrations.cudainv.title: 📚 CUDA toolkit inventory
integrations.cudainv.desc: Walks /usr/local/cuda*, conda envs and LD_LIBRARY_PATH to enumerate every CUDA install and flag major-version collisions.
integrations.flavor.title: 🪪 Open vs proprietary driver advisor
integrations.flavor.desc: Reads /sys/module/nvidia/version + modinfo. Cross-references each GPU's compute capability against the open-driver support table. Catches the Pascal-on-open-driver bricking bug.
integrations.procdeep.title: 🔍 procfs deep-state diff
integrations.procdeep.desc: Mines /proc/driver/nvidia/gpus/*/information for fields NVML doesn't expose (GPU Excluded RMA flag, GSP firmware, VBIOS, IRQ, DMA size). Baselines on first observation, alerts on drift.
integrations.aspm.title: ⚡ PCIe ASPM audit
integrations.aspm.desc: Z690/B650/X870 boards can introduce 200ms PCIe stalls in low-power states. Reads /sys/module/pcie_aspm/parameters/policy + DMI board name, cross-references known-risky chipsets.
integrations.fsaudit.title: 💾 Model dir FS audit
integrations.fsaudit.desc: Walks well-known LLM/SD/ComfyUI model directories and inspects /proc/mounts for footguns : btrfs compression, NFS without noatime, ecryptfs, tmpfs, data=journal.
integrations.batch.title: 📐 Batch / ctx-length advisor
integrations.batch.desc: Fuses GGUF metadata, current VRAM headroom, and KV-cache math to recommend the largest safe context window per loaded model.
integrations.batch.no_advisors: No loaded model with enough metadata to compute an advisory.
integrations.dkms.title: 🔧 DKMS rebuild status
integrations.dkms.desc: After a kernel upgrade, the NVIDIA DKMS module sometimes fails to rebuild — apt's hook swallows the error and the GPU 'disappears' on reboot. Catches this state with a one-line fix command.
integrations.aer.title: 📡 PCIe AER counter
integrations.aer.desc: Reads /sys/bus/pci/devices/<gpu>/aer_dev_{correctable,fatal,nonfatal}. Steady correctable-error drip points to a bad cable / marginal riser BEFORE the link drops.
integrations.memtemp.title: 🌡 VRAM thermal-pad drift
integrations.memtemp.desc: Tracks (mem_temp − gpu_temp) delta over 30 days per GPU. Drift > +5 °C signals GDDR6X pad degradation on 3090 / 4090 / A6000 — repad before MEM_TEMP throttle hits.
integrations.acc.title: 📓 NVML accounting harvester
integrations.acc.desc: Persists peak VRAM, GPU util and wall-time for terminated PIDs. Post-mortem layer for crashed llama-server / ComfyUI / vLLM jobs.
integrations.trim.title: ✂ TRIM / discard auditor
integrations.trim.desc: Catches the silent SSD-wear pattern from missing discard mounts + masked fstrim.timer. Complements model-dir FS audit with the SSD lifecycle dimension.
integrations.tbits.title: 🎚 Throttle bits decoded
integrations.tbits.desc: Refines #19.2 by exposing every individual throttle-reason bit with its own severity. Headline picks the most severe active bit.
integrations.retire.title: 📑 Retired-page trend
integrations.retire.desc: Pascal / Volta / Maxwell cards (1080 Ti, P40, Titan V…) retire bad GDDR pages here. SBE = transient, DBE = silicon defect (near-RMA).
integrations.retire.unsupported: Newer cards use Ampere row-remap — see ECC scrubber.
integrations.bugrep.title: 🐞 NVIDIA bug-report prepper
integrations.bugrep.desc: Composes a ready-to-paste ticket template from shipped XID + GSP + DKMS + driver state. Includes the exact sudo nvidia-bug-report.sh command.
integrations.pwidth.title: 📏 PCIe link-width watcher
integrations.pwidth.desc: Static x16 → x4 / x8 downgrades from flaky risers, OcuLink wear, dirty slot pins. Caught early before the card 'feels slow'.
integrations.ctxleak.title: 👻 CUDA context-leak detector
integrations.ctxleak.desc: Walks /proc/<pid>/fd for /dev/nvidiaN handles, cross-refs with active CUDA apps. Zombie FDs pin VRAM after Jupyter / llama-server crashes.
integrations.staticaud.title: 🔐 Static PCI auditor
integrations.staticaud.desc: sha256-fingerprints per-boot static PCI facts (vendor/device/subsystem/BARs/IRQ). Catches reseated cards + vBIOS-reshuffle scams.
integrations.bwgauge.title: 📈 Mem-bandwidth saturation
integrations.bwgauge.desc: utilization.memory is the most mis-read NVIDIA metric. Samples over a short window, computes the mem/compute ratio, classifies bandwidth- vs compute-bound.
integrations.pwrenv.title: 🔌 Power-envelope drift
integrations.pwrenv.desc: User-set `nvidia-smi -pl` is not persistent — driver upgrades silently reset it. Detects the reset, emits the exact restore command.
integrations.rebar.title: 📡 Resizable-BAR (ReBAR) audit
integrations.rebar.desc: Enabling ReBAR via UEFI maps the full GPU VRAM into host address space — 5-12% free inference perf. Most desktop owners have it off.
integrations.rapl.title: 🌡 CPU-package RAPL
integrations.rapl.desc: Reads per-CPU-package energy via Linux RAPL. Adds the host-side draw to your tokens/Watt and €/month widgets.
integrations.rapl.not_supported: Not supported (no /sys/class/powercap, VM hides RAPL, or kernel module missing).
integrations.clockgap.title: 📏 Clock-gap detector
integrations.clockgap.desc: Compares clocks.applications.gr (user-set via -ac) vs actually-enforced clock. Labels the binding constraint when -ac doesn't stick.
integrations.rpm.title: 💤 PCIe runtime-PM auditor
integrations.rpm.desc: Linux runtime-PM can D3cold the GPU between requests. Wake takes 50-500 ms — fine for desktops, catastrophic for inference TTFT. Pin to 'on' for deterministic latency.
integrations.thermzones.title: 🌬 Thermal-zone correlator
integrations.thermzones.desc: Cross-references every /sys/class/thermal zone with the throttle classifier. Surfaces airflow advice instead of generic 'GPU is hot'.
integrations.nvrmtail.title: 📜 NVRM / GSP log tailer
integrations.nvrmtail.desc: Categorized live tail of all NVIDIA kernel chatter — RmInit, NvKmsKapi, GSP, XID. Catches subtle issues invisible to the specific decoders.
integrations.nvrmtail.no_entries: No NVIDIA kernel chatter in this window.
integrations.nvlink.title: 🔗 NVLink health
integrations.nvlink.desc: Tracks CRC + replay error growth per NVLink (dual-3090 / 4090 LLM rigs). Catches silent bandwidth drops before tensor-parallel throughput collapses.
integrations.nvlink.unsupported: No NVLink detected (single-GPU rig or model lacks NVLink).
integrations.kmod.title: 🎚 nvidia kmod parameter auditor
integrations.kmod.desc: Reads /sys/module/nvidia/parameters/* and flags known foot-guns. The canonical NVreg_PreserveVideoMemoryAllocations=0 loses VRAM contents on suspend.
integrations.d3cold.title: 🧊 D3cold policy auditor
integrations.d3cold.desc: Cross-references GPU runtime-PM control with parent-bridge d3cold_allowed. Catches 'GPU spins idle without sleeping' or 'bridge drags GPU to D3cold' edge cases.
integrations.tslow.title: 🌡 HW vs SW thermal slowdown
integrations.tslow.desc: Refines #25.5 by splitting the two thermal bits with current temp. Distinguishes 'normal load throttling' from 'fan died' from 'TJMax cooler failure'.
integrations.rlimit.title: 🔐 LLM daemon MEMLOCK auditor
integrations.rlimit.desc: systemd-launched LLM daemons inherit LimitMEMLOCK=64K — far below model size. mlock() fails silently and weights swap. Surfaces affected processes + paste-ready Drop-In.
integrations.dmi.title: 🪪 DMI / BIOS revision tracker
integrations.dmi.desc: Reads /sys/devices/virtual/dmi/id/ and cross-references your motherboard against a small catalog of 'minimum BIOS for ReBAR + AER'. Turns generic 'update BIOS' advice into 'you're on F11, flash F16'.
integrations.nvme.title: 💾 NVMe I/O scheduler for GGUF mmap
integrations.nvme.desc: Reads /sys/block/nvme*/queue/{scheduler,read_ahead_kb}. Catches the Ubuntu default mq-deadline + 128 KiB readahead that doubles cold-load time on 32 GiB GGUFs.
integrations.iommu.title: 🧩 IOMMU group passthrough auditor
integrations.iommu.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/iommu_groups/*/devices/ and flags GPUs that share their group with chipset USB/SATA/NVMe — meaning whole-group VFIO passthrough or pcie_acs_override is required.
integrations.iommu.disabled: IOMMU disabled in kernel — VFIO passthrough not possible.
integrations.msi.title: ⚡ MSI-X vector inventory
integrations.msi.desc: Enumerates /sys/bus/pci/devices/<gpu>/msi_irqs/ + cross-checks /proc/interrupts. Detects when an NVIDIA GPU falls back to a single MSI vector or legacy IO-APIC (~10% CUDA copy latency tax).
integrations.oom.title: 🛡 OOM-priority for inference daemons
integrations.oom.desc: Reads /proc/<pid>/oom_score{,_adj} for ollama / llama-server / vllm. The default adj=0 with a 20-GiB RSS makes them first to die under memory pressure — emits a systemd Drop-In with OOMScoreAdjust=-500.
integrations.cpu.title: 🧠 CPU topology + governor advisor
integrations.cpu.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/{topology,cpufreq} + hybrid CPU types. Flags 'powersave on P-cores' (loses 30-40 % prompt-processing tokens/s) and emits taskset / CPUAffinity recipes for hybrid Alder/Raptor Lake.
integrations.smaps.title: 📦 LLM residence breakdown (smaps_rollup)
integrations.smaps.desc: Parses /proc/<pid>/smaps_rollup for inference daemons. Splits RSS into file-mmap (your GGUF in page cache), anon (KV cache), and Swap. Catches 'mmap evicted from page cache' + 'daemon is actively swapping'.
integrations.hwmon.title: 🌡 hwmon NVMe + chipset thermal parity
integrations.hwmon.desc: Enumerates /sys/class/hwmon/ — surfaces NVMe / chipset / SuperIO / CPU temps that the thermal_zone view misses. Catches 'M.2 NVMe under the GPU is at 78 °C → throttling'.
integrations.hwmon.no_hwmon: No /sys/class/hwmon sensors on this host (VM or driverless kernel).
integrations.vmsysctl.title: 🔧 VM sysctl LLM-rig audit
integrations.vmsysctl.desc: Audits /proc/sys/vm/* against an LLM-rig baseline. Catches the default swappiness=60 that swaps your weights, emits a single /etc/sysctl.d/99-llm.conf Drop-In.
integrations.psi.title: ⏱ PSI pressure-stall correlator
integrations.psi.desc: Parses /proc/pressure/{cpu,memory,io} — `some.avg10` flags CPU contention, `full.avg10` flags severe stalls. Cross-references the cause-chain modules.
integrations.wchan.title: 🔍 wchan + stack stuck debugger
integrations.wchan.desc: Reads /proc/<pid>/{wchan,status,stack} for inference daemons. Maps kernel-symbol wait channels to verdicts: io_bound / page_cache_wait / mem_pressure / blocked.
integrations.cgmemcap.title: 📦 cgroup memory-cap scanner
integrations.cgmemcap.desc: Resolves /proc/<pid>/cgroup → /sys/fs/cgroup/<path>/memory.{max,high,current,swap.*,events}. Catches 'systemd unit capped at 4G but model is 16G' or 'swap_active inside cgroup'.
integrations.clock.title: 🕰 Kernel clocksource audit
integrations.clock.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/clocksource/clocksource0/* and infers virt mode. Catches HPET / jiffies fallback and surfaces the right clocksource for KVM/Xen/Hyper-V guests.
integrations.nic.title: 🛜 LAN NIC health correlator
integrations.nic.desc: Enumerates /sys/class/net/<dev>/ for physical interfaces (skips lo/docker/virbr/veth). Catches link-flap + ring-buffer drops + sub-gigabit links for LAN-served ollama.
integrations.procio.title: 📈 Per-daemon IO accounting
integrations.procio.desc: Parses /proc/<pid>/io. read_bytes >> RSS reveals GGUF being reread from disk every inference (page-cache eviction). Cross-references the full causal chain.
integrations.cgcpuio.title: ⚖ cgroup CPU/IO priority
integrations.cgcpuio.desc: Reads cpu.weight + io.weight + cpu.max from each LLM daemon's cgroup. The systemd default (100/100) loses CPU/IO share to backups + builders on shared hosts.
integrations.thp.title: 📑 Transparent Hugepage audit
integrations.thp.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/transparent_hugepage/{enabled,defrag}. Ubuntu/Debian default `madvise` leaves 1-5% perf on the table for LLM KV-cache. Elevating to `always` reduces TLB pressure.
integrations.buddy.title: 🧱 Memory fragmentation (/proc/buddyinfo)
integrations.buddy.desc: Per-zone, per-order free-page counts. When order 9-10 (2-4 MiB blocks) drops below threshold, the next THP alloc triggers sync compaction → TTFT stalls.
integrations.sched.title: 🔄 Per-daemon scheduler stats
integrations.sched.desc: Parses /proc/<pid>/sched and counts voluntary vs involuntary switches. High involuntary ratio means scheduler is preempting your inference daemon — cache thrash.
integrations.oomd.title: 💀 systemd-oomd correlator
integrations.oomd.desc: Probes systemctl + journalctl for systemd-oomd activity. Catches the silent kills oomd performs based on cgroup memory.pressure thresholds.
integrations.boost.title: 🚀 CPU turbo / boost audit
integrations.boost.desc: Reads cpufreq/boost + intel_pstate/no_turbo + amd_pstate. Catches BIOS or tuning-script disabled turbo — costs 30-40 % prompt-processing.
integrations.netsysctl.title: 🛰 LAN socket-buffer audit
integrations.netsysctl.desc: Audits net.core.{rmem_max,wmem_max,somaxconn,netdev_max_backlog}. Catches the 208 KiB defaults that throttle SSE-streamed inference responses.
integrations.smt.title: 🧵 SMT / offline-core audit
integrations.smt.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/{smt/*,offline}. Detects SMT explicitly disabled OR cores offlined while SMT is on (wasted hardware).
integrations.numa.title: 🗺 NUMA placement audit
integrations.numa.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/node/* + /proc/<pid>/numa_maps. Catches LLM mmap split across NUMA nodes — 1.5-2× cross-node latency per weight read.
integrations.taint.title: ⚠ Kernel taint audit
integrations.taint.desc: Decodes /proc/sys/kernel/tainted bitmask. Tells you whether the NVIDIA proprietary driver's W+O+E signature is the WHOLE story, or whether bits like M (machine check) / L (soft lockup) are screaming.
integrations.uc.title: ⏏ CPU microcode revision audit
integrations.uc.desc: Parses /proc/cpuinfo microcode field per CPU. Detects drift (mid-flight update without initramfs rebuild) and surfaces vendor-specific package recipe.
integrations.epp.title: ⚡ HWP Energy Performance Preference
integrations.epp.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cpufreq/energy_performance_preference. Catches `balance_power` (laptop default) capping inference throughput by 10-20%.
integrations.cpuidle.title: 💤 cpuidle C-state audit
integrations.cpuidle.desc: Reads cpuidle driver + governor + per-state exit latency. Deep C-states cost ~1000 µs to wake — pays a tax on every CUDA roundtrip.
integrations.cpvulns.title: 🛡 CPU vulnerabilities cost auditor
integrations.cpvulns.desc: Decodes /sys/devices/system/cpu/vulnerabilities/*. Aggregate Spectre+MDS+Retbleed cost is ~10-20% on prompt-processing — accept-or-fix decision.
integrations.wdog.title: 🐕 Hardware watchdog auditor
integrations.wdog.desc: Reads /sys/class/watchdog/* — surfaces unattended-reliability story (bootstatus = last hang, no pinger = inert).
integrations.gpuaff.title: 🎯 GPU↔CPU PCIe affinity advisor
integrations.gpuaff.desc: Reads /sys/bus/pci/devices/<gpu>/local_cpulist. Finer-grain than NUMA: catches multi-CCD AMD / multi-socket where only some CPUs are 'local' to each GPU.
integrations.cache.title: 🧮 L3 cache topology advisor
integrations.cache.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cache/index*. Detects Zen4 CCD splits + Alder/Raptor P+E L3 islands — pin to one for KV-cache locality.
integrations.pam.title: 🔒 PAM memlock auditor
integrations.pam.desc: Parses /etc/security/limits.{conf,d}/*. Companion to #29.8 — covers SSH/sudo/tmux sessions that bypass systemd LimitMEMLOCK.
integrations.aer.title: 📉 PCIe AER counter trend
integrations.aer.desc: Reads aer_dev_{correctable,fatal,nonfatal} per GPU + persists baseline. Answers 'are errors accumulating?' — companion to shipped #28.5 snapshot.
integrations.irqaff.title: 🎯 GPU IRQ effective-CPU advisor
integrations.irqaff.desc: Reads /proc/irq/<n>/effective_affinity_list for GPU MSI/MSI-X vectors. Catches 'all IRQs on CPU0' — ksoftirqd hotspot.
integrations.mprb.title: 🔧 modprobe.d ↔ runtime drift
integrations.mprb.desc: Parses /etc/modprobe.d/*.conf vs /sys/module/nvidia/parameters/*. Detects 'edited conf but never update-initramfs + reboot'.
integrations.maps.title: 🧬 Shared-lib (deleted) detector
integrations.maps.desc: Reads /proc/<pid>/maps for LLM daemons, flags '(deleted)' libcuda*/libnvidia* still mapped after driver upgrade.
integrations.cmd.title: 🥾 Kernel cmdline audit
integrations.cmd.desc: Parses /proc/cmdline. Detects mitigations=off, isolcpus, intel_pstate=disable etc. — upstream toggles that override or explain other audit modules.
integrations.core.title: 💥 Coredump readiness
integrations.core.desc: Validates /proc/sys/kernel/core_pattern + per-PID coredump_filter. Will llama-server produce a useful core file on crash?
integrations.host.title: 🖥 Host class (chassis + virt)
integrations.host.desc: Detects laptop / desktop / server / VM from DMI chassis_type + QEMU sys_vendor + qemu_fw_cfg. Helps tailor other recipes to your form-factor.
integrations.sysd.title: 📜 sysctl.d ↔ runtime drift
integrations.sysd.desc: Parses every key=value across /etc/sysctl.{conf,d/*.conf} + /usr/lib/sysctl.d/* vs /proc/sys/*. Catches 'edited but never `sudo sysctl --system`'.
integrations.ksm.title: 🧬 KSM (Kernel Same-page Merging) advisor
integrations.ksm.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/ksm/* + per-PID /proc/<pid>/ksm_stat. Catches the case where ksmd is futilely scanning your tensor pages for dedups that don't exist — 3-8 % kernel CPU + TLB flushes for zero benefit on a single-host LLM rig.
integrations.vmd.title: 🌊 Deeper VM tuning (page-cluster / kswapd / reclaim)
integrations.vmd.desc: Audits /proc/sys/vm/{page-cluster,watermark_scale_factor,vfs_cache_pressure,min_free_kbytes,zone_reclaim_mode} — the less-touched but higher-impact-for-LLM knobs that extend the swappiness/dirty audit.
integrations.gpb.title: 🔌 GPU PCIe driver-binding
integrations.gpb.desc: Walks /sys/bus/pci/devices for 0x10de + sibling functions (display + audio + USB-C). Surfaces which driver each function is on (nvidia / nouveau / vfio-pci / orphaned) and emits paste-ready host↔VM rebind recipes.
integrations.nic.title: 📡 NIC RX/TX queue + RPS/XPS affinity
integrations.nic.desc: Audits /sys/class/net/<dev>/queues/{rx-N,tx-N}/{rps_cpus,xps_cpus,rps_flow_cnt} for LAN-served inference. Cross-references GPU NUMA placement to flag RX softIRQs that land off-NUMA.
integrations.pan.title: 🛟 Panic + hung_task auto-reboot policy
integrations.pan.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/{panic,panic_on_oops,hung_task_panic,softlockup_panic,nmi_watchdog,...}. Headless rigs should reboot themselves after a fault — kernel.panic=0 (most distro defaults) hangs the console forever.
integrations.ecc.title: 🧠 EDAC RAM ECC + DIMM labels
integrations.ecc.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/edac/mc/mc*/{ce_count,ue_count,dimm*/dimm_label,...}. ECC RAM only helps if the kernel reports the errors — surfaces the per-DIMM ce_count / ue_count so you can find the failing stick by BIOS slot label.
integrations.ino.title: 👀 inotify + fanotify watch budget
integrations.ino.desc: Reads /proc/sys/fs/inotify/{max_user_watches,max_user_instances,max_queued_events} + walks /proc/<pid>/fdinfo counting per-PID inotify watches. Catches "VS Code / Plex / Syncthing is silently failing — out of watches".
integrations.zsw.title: 🗜️ zswap + zram compressed-swap
integrations.zsw.desc: Audits /sys/module/zswap/parameters/* + /sys/block/zram* + /proc/swaps. On a 32-GB host with a 24-GB quant, enabling zswap absorbs 60-80 % of swap traffic with single-digit-ms latency vs NVMe's 200-2000 µs.
integrations.epb.title: ⚖️ Legacy CPU EPB (energy_perf_bias)
integrations.epb.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/power/energy_perf_bias. On HWP-disabled hosts (Haswell-EP, Broadwell-EP, Skylake-SP) the legacy EPB MSR still wins over HWP-EPP and silently throttles 5-15% below benchmark.
integrations.cdev.title: ❄️ Thermal cooling devices
integrations.cdev.desc: Walks /sys/class/thermal/cooling_device*/* and the thermal_zone* binding graph. The actuator side of the thermal subsystem that the shipped thermal_zones (sensor side) card leaves uncovered.
integrations.hcpu.title: 🧩 Hybrid CPU cluster / die topology
integrations.hcpu.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/topology/{cluster_id,die_id,package_id} + cpuinfo_max_freq. Identifies Alder/Raptor P/E split, Zen multi-CCD, Snapdragon X clusters for surgical inference pinning.
integrations.lock.title: 🔒 Model-file lock contention
integrations.lock.desc: Parses /proc/locks + walks /proc/<pid>/fd. Catches the ollama-vs-llama-server flock race on the same GGUF blob that silently stalls inference prefill 3-30 seconds.
integrations.ring.title: 📥 NIC ring-buffer drop monitor
integrations.ring.desc: Reads /sys/class/net/<dev>/statistics/{rx_dropped,rx_fifo_errors,...}. Catches the hardware ring-buffer overrun + kernel backlog overflow that silently times out LAN inference clients with no obvious error.
integrations.irq.title: ⚡ IRQ rate + softirq imbalance
integrations.irq.desc: Parses /proc/interrupts + /proc/softirqs. Catches the case where one CPU eats > 60 % of a device's IRQ volume — typical virtio + cheap-NIC default with no irqbalance.
integrations.zi.title: 🌊 zoneinfo + vmstat reclaim/compaction
integrations.zi.desc: Reads /proc/zoneinfo + /proc/vmstat. Surfaces direct-reclaim activity (50-200 ms inference stalls), compaction failures (THP fallback), and zone-low watermarks (kswapd active) — runtime counterpart to vm_tuning_deep.
integrations.bq.title: 📀 Block-layer queue audit
integrations.bq.desc: Walks /sys/block/<dev>/queue/* (scheduler, read_ahead_kb, rotational, wbt_lat_usec, …). Catches rotational mis-detect + scheduler/device mismatch + read-ahead starvation on NVMe streaming a GGUF.
integrations.wd.title: 🐕 Hardware watchdog inventory
integrations.wd.desc: Reads /sys/class/watchdog/watchdog*/{identity,timeout,bootstatus,...}. Surfaces the per-watchdog state + decodes bootstatus to answer 'did the last reboot come from a watchdog?' for headless rig incident investigation.
integrations.dio.title: ⏱️ Disk I/O latency (per-device)
integrations.dio.desc: Parses /proc/diskstats per-device read/write ticks + completions for cumulative average wait. Catches mmap thrash, dm-crypt stalls, queue saturation on NVMe.
integrations.npc.title: 📡 TCP/UDP protocol counters
integrations.npc.desc: Parses /proc/net/{snmp,netstat,sockstat}. Catches accept() queue overflow (ListenOverflows), TCP retrans rate, TCP memory pressure, UDP RcvbufErrors — the actual 'why is my LAN-served inference timing out' diagnostic.
integrations.slab.title: 🧱 SLUB slab cache audit
integrations.slab.desc: Parses /proc/slabinfo + /sys/kernel/slab/*. Identifies fragmentation + leak-suspect caches on long-uptime rigs. Often requires CAP_DAC_READ_SEARCH on modern distros.
integrations.ent.title: 🎲 Entropy + hwrng auditor
integrations.ent.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/random/* + /sys/class/misc/hw_random/*. Catches boot-time TLS/SSH handshake stall risk when no hwrng feeds the CRNG.
integrations.ct.title: 🔁 Netfilter conntrack table
integrations.ct.desc: Reads /proc/sys/net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_* + /proc/net/stat/nf_conntrack. Catches table saturation + silent insert-drops on fan-out load.
integrations.ipc.title: 🧮 SysV IPC leak detector
integrations.ipc.desc: Parses /proc/sysvipc/{shm,sem,msg}. Catches orphaned shm (nattch=0) from crashed CUDA-MPS / postgres + sem exhaustion + msg queue backlog.
integrations.md.title: 🪞 Software RAID (md) health
integrations.md.desc: Parses /proc/mdstat + /sys/block/md*/md/*. Flags degraded arrays, silent-corruption mismatch counters, in-progress resync.
integrations.kr.title: 🔑 Kernel keyring quota
integrations.kr.desc: Parses /proc/key-users + /proc/keys. Catches per-UID keyring quota saturation + session-keyring leaks (logout-GC slowness, daemon respawn loops).
integrations.sec.title: 🛡️ Security posture (LSM + lockdown + paranoia)
integrations.sec.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/security/{lsm,lockdown} + /proc/sys/kernel/{perf_event_paranoid,yama/ptrace_scope,unprivileged_bpf_disabled,kptr_restrict,dmesg_restrict,modules_disabled}. Surface 'too loose' for non-dev hosts.
integrations.vfs.title: 📁 VFS + io_uring headroom
integrations.vfs.desc: Reads /proc/sys/fs/{file-nr,file-max,nr_open,aio-nr,aio-max-nr,pipe-*}. Surfaces FD / AIO context saturation.
integrations.nv.title: 🎮 nvidia RM registry + capabilities
integrations.nv.desc: Reads /proc/driver/nvidia/{params,registry,version,capabilities/}. Catches partial DKMS rebuild (kmod vs nvidia-smi version skew) + missing capability paths in rootless containers.
integrations.mce.title: 💀 MCE bank + CMCI auditor
integrations.mce.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/machinecheck/machinecheck*/* — ignore_ce / tolerant / cmci_disabled / per-bank masks. Catches firmware silencing CE that EDAC then 'cleanly' reports as zero.
integrations.acpi.title: ⚡ ACPI platform-profile + GPE
integrations.acpi.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/acpi/{platform_profile,pm_profile,interrupts/gpe*} + /proc/acpi/wakeup. Catches quiet-profile-on-workstation + GPE storms + PCIe-root wakeup blocking GPU D3cold.
integrations.sched.title: 🏃 CFS runqueue-wait + features
integrations.sched.desc: Parses /proc/schedstat for per-CPU runqueue-wait time. Surfaces "≥1 CPU has avg wait > 100 µs" — the actual cause of inter-token decode jitter on cgroup-contended hosts.
integrations.dma.title: 🔀 DMA engine + SWIOTLB
integrations.dma.desc: Reads /sys/class/dma/* + /sys/kernel/debug/swiotlb/*. Catches SWIOTLB bounce-buffer saturation + idle DMA engines.
integrations.ftr.title: 🔍 ftrace orphan + tracer-left-on
integrations.ftr.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/tracing/{current_tracer,tracing_on,kprobe_events,...}. Catches debug sessions that left tracers / kprobes attached — measurable inter-token jitter.
integrations.usb.title: 🔌 USB topology + power + speed
integrations.usb.desc: Walks /sys/bus/usb/devices/*. Catches USB-3 cable downgrades, autosuspend dropping HID keystrokes, bMaxPower > 500 mA risking bus-brownout.
integrations.jr.title: 📓 systemd journal config + size
integrations.jr.desc: Parses /etc/systemd/journald.conf{,.d/*.conf} + sums /var/log/journal/. Catches Storage=none, oversized growth, rate-limit drops.
integrations.rtc.title: ⏰ RTC + PPS clock source
integrations.rtc.desc: Reads /sys/class/rtc/* + /sys/class/pps/*. Catches RTC drift > 60s (post-resume system clock seeded wrong) + hctosys disabled on offline rigs.
integrations.tpm.title: 🔐 TPM 1.2/2.0 + measured boot
integrations.tpm.desc: Reads /sys/class/tpm/* + /sys/kernel/security/tpm0/binary_bios_measurements. Catches TPM 1.2 legacy (LUKS / attestation broken) + missing measured-boot log.
integrations.wmi.title: 💻 WMI + vendor platform driver
integrations.wmi.desc: Walks /sys/class/wmi/* + thinkpad_acpi / asus-wmi / dell-smbios / hp-wmi / msi-ec / gigabyte-wmi / framework_laptop. Surfaces battery / fan / GPU-MUX knobs.
integrations.kmsg.title: 📋 /dev/kmsg + printk ratelimit
integrations.kmsg.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/printk* + best-effort /dev/kmsg tail. Catches rate-limit drops + 'loud kernel' err/warn floods.
integrations.sock.title: 🔌 Socket pool + TIME_WAIT
integrations.sock.desc: Parses /proc/net/sockstat{,6} + counts /proc/net/{tcp,tcp6,unix}. Catches TIME_WAIT saturation (kernel drops outbound conns), orphan-TCP leaks, unix-socket daemon leaks.
integrations.iio.title: 🌡️ IIO sensor inventory
integrations.iio.desc: Walks /sys/bus/iio/devices/iio:device*/ for ambient-light + accel + gyro + barometer + chassis-intrusion + env sensors.
integrations.drm.title: 🖥️ DRM connector + EDID + modes
integrations.drm.desc: Walks /sys/class/drm/card*-<connector>/ for status / enabled / EDID / mode count. Catches enabled-but-disconnected connectors wasting pipe.
integrations.cmem.title: 📊 cgroup v2 memory.events
integrations.cmem.desc: Walks /sys/fs/cgroup/ for per-unit memory.events + swap.events + peak. Surfaces OOM kills + swap failures tied to specific systemd units.
integrations.psu.title: 🔋 Battery / AC / UPS health
integrations.psu.desc: Walks /sys/class/power_supply/* for battery wear (charge_full/design), AC online state, and missing charge thresholds — the silent battery killer on laptop-host LLM rigs.
integrations.typec.title: 🔌 USB-C alt-mode + PD contract
integrations.typec.desc: Reads /sys/class/typec/port*/ + /sys/class/extcon/* for data/power role + USB-PD revision + alt-mode partner. Catches "sink-only" ports + missing PD contracts that throttle eGPU bandwidth.
integrations.pmu.title: 📡 perf PMU + uncore + GPU PMU
integrations.pmu.desc: Walks /sys/bus/event_source/devices/* for type + nr_addr_filters + events/format counts. Surfaces uncore_imc / cpu / msr / nvidia / power PMUs — the actual events you can perf-stat on this host.
integrations.iomempci.title: 🧮 IOMEM + PCI BAR + reset method
integrations.iomempci.desc: Parses /proc/iomem (kptr_restrict masking detect) + walks /sys/bus/pci/devices/*. Surfaces unbound devices + bus-only-reset devices (IOMMU-group peers go down on reset).
integrations.ksm.title: 🧬 KSM + THP mm-knobs
integrations.ksm.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/ksm/* + /sys/kernel/mm/transparent_hugepage/*. Catches THP=always + aggressive defrag (khugepaged stalls during big model loads) and KSM thrashing on bare-metal LLM hosts.
integrations.i2c.title: 🔧 I2C / SMBus / DDC
integrations.i2c.desc: Walks /sys/bus/i2c/devices/* + stats /dev/i2c-*. Catches world-writable DDC nodes (any user can flash EDID/SPD) and missing NVIDIA DDC nubs (silent nvidia-settings failures).
integrations.modint.title: 🔐 Module integrity + NVIDIA version
integrations.modint.desc: Decodes /proc/sys/kernel/tainted, scans /sys/module/*/taint, and cross-checks /sys/module/nvidia/version vs /proc/driver/nvidia/version. Catches the half-upgraded NVIDIA stack before CUDA breaks.
integrations.psi.title: 🧊 PSI pressure stalls
integrations.psi.desc: Reads /proc/pressure/{cpu,memory,io}. Surfaces sustained stalls that don't trip OOM/thermal but quietly tank tokens/sec — memory paging, slow swap, runqueue contention.
integrations.cpuvuln.title: 🛡 CPU vulnerabilities + SMT
integrations.cpuvuln.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/cpu/vulnerabilities/* + smt + /proc/cmdline. Catches forgotten `mitigations=off`, missing microcode, and SMT-vulnerable cross-tenant leaks.
integrations.ima.title: 🧾 IMA / EVM / Secure Boot chain
integrations.ima.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/security/ima/* + evm + /sys/firmware/efi/efivars/SecureBoot-*. Catches the case where Secure Boot is on but IMA/EVM never armed — userland binaries run unmeasured.
integrations.rapl.title: ⚡ RAPL power-cap + cpufreq
integrations.rapl.desc: Walks /sys/class/powercap/intel-rapl* + cpufreq governors + intel_pstate. Catches BIOS/PPD clamping PL1 below TDP — LLM prefill becomes CPU-bound with NO thermal trip.
integrations.swaptun.title: 💾 Swap tunables (page-cluster, swappiness)
integrations.swaptun.desc: Reads /proc/sys/vm/{swappiness,page-cluster,...} + /proc/swaps + per-device rotational + zram detection + GPU detection. Catches swappiness=60 on a GPU host, page-cluster=3 on zram, and swap on HDD.
integrations.hugep.title: 📏 Explicit HugeTLB pool
integrations.hugep.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/mm/hugepages + per-NUMA pools + /proc/meminfo HugePages_*. Catches reserved-but-unused pages, NUMA skew, and rigid pools without overcommit.
integrations.kvm.title: 🛞 KVM runtime + nested + perms
integrations.kvm.desc: Reads /sys/devices/virtual/misc/kvm + /sys/module/kvm{,_intel,_amd}/parameters + /dev/kvm perms. Catches nested-on-with-passthrough, halt_poll excess, wrong-group /dev/kvm.
integrations.iouring.title: 🚀 io_uring runtime + CVE band
integrations.iouring.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/io_uring_* + /sys/kernel/debug/io_uring. Catches Ubuntu 24.04+ silently disabling io_uring (vLLM async-IO breaks) and old kernels with open io_uring.
integrations.edac.title: 🧠 DRAM ECC counters (EDAC)
integrations.edac.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/edac/mc/mc*/* + per-DIMM counters. Per-stick ECC error counters that persist since boot — distinct from machinecheck banks. UEs silently corrupt KV-cache and mmap'd weights.
integrations.numa.title: 🧭 NUMA topology + GPU affinity
integrations.numa.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/node/* + GPU numa_node + /proc/sys/kernel/numa_balancing. Catches GPU PCIe slot with numa_node=-1 (cross-socket KV-cache) and numa_miss > 5 %.
integrations.hwmon.title: 🌬 Fans / voltages / PWM (hwmon)
integrations.hwmon.desc: Walks /sys/class/hwmon/* for fan tach + voltage alarms + PWM enable mode. Catches stalled case fans next to the GPU and PWM left in manual override.
integrations.efiboot.title: 🥾 EFI boot order + dbx + varstore
integrations.efiboot.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/efi/efivars/{BootCurrent,BootOrder,BootNext,dbx*} + varstore fill. Catches BootNext pinned by failed install, varstore near full (Lenovo brick risk), and missing dbx.
integrations.satapm.title: 🛢 SATA link power management
integrations.satapm.desc: Reads /sys/class/scsi_host/host*/link_power_management_policy + /sys/class/ata_link/*. Catches aggressive ALPM that adds 50-200 ms tail latency to first IO after idle.
integrations.bdi.title: 🪣 Per-BDI writeback + readahead
integrations.bdi.desc: Walks /sys/class/bdi/<maj:min>/* + cross-checks /proc/partitions to filter pseudo-BDIs. Catches read_ahead_kb≤128 on NVMe (cold load slow) and max_ratio=1 leftovers.
integrations.crypto.title: 🔑 /proc/crypto FIPS + AES-NI
integrations.crypto.desc: Parses /proc/crypto + /proc/sys/crypto/fips_enabled + CPU AES flag. Catches FIPS-mode silently on, microcode-rollback AES-NI loss, selftest failures.
integrations.wakeup.title: ⏰ Wakeup sources / GPE chatter
integrations.wakeup.desc: Walks /sys/class/wakeup/* + /proc/uptime to compute event rates. Catches chatty USB hubs or GPEs keeping the box out of deep C-states (6-12 W idle waste).
integrations.livepatch.title: 🩹 Kernel live patches
integrations.livepatch.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/livepatch/*/{enabled,transition,signature}. Catches stuck transitions that pin task stacks, unsigned patches, and disabled bookkeeping leftovers.
integrations.pageti.title: 🧩 Memory fragmentation (pagetypeinfo)
integrations.pageti.desc: Parses /proc/pagetypeinfo by migrate-type × order. Catches Unmovable pollution of Movable blocks and order-9 starvation that pushes THP to 4 KiB fallback.
integrations.blpwm.title: 💡 Backlight + PWM
integrations.blpwm.desc: Reads /sys/class/backlight/* + /sys/class/pwm/*. Catches the 'alive but dark' state (bl_power=4 / brightness=0) on a headless host and PWM channels half-configured.
integrations.loadavg.title: 📈 Loadavg + D-state + RT throttle
integrations.loadavg.desc: Correlates /proc/loadavg + procs_blocked + nr_cpus + sched_rt_runtime_us. Catches CPU overcommit, D-state pileup, and the RT safety throttle disabled.
integrations.cgroot.title: 🌳 cgroup v2 root + delegation
integrations.cgroot.desc: Reads /sys/fs/cgroup/{controllers,subtree_control,...}. Catches v1/v2 hybrid mounts and undelegated controllers (systemd slices silently inherit no quota).
integrations.kcfg.title: 🔧 Kernel build config
integrations.kcfg.desc: Parses /boot/config-$(uname -r) or /proc/config.gz. Catches debug kernels (30%+ perf penalty), server PREEMPT_NONE on a desktop, and THP_ALWAYS compile default.
integrations.scsi.title: 🧲 SCSI mid-layer transport
integrations.scsi.desc: Walks /sys/class/scsi_disk/* + /sys/class/scsi_device/* + /sys/class/scsi_host/*. Catches write-through cache on the HF-cache SSD (5-10× slower writes) and queue-depth=1 PIO fallback.
integrations.alsa.title: 🔊 ALSA cards + GPU HDA PM
integrations.alsa.desc: Reads /proc/asound/cards + /sys/class/sound/card*/device/power/control. Catches NVIDIA HDA function stuck at power/control=on (5-8 W idle waste, ASPM L1 substates blocked).
integrations.dmi.title: 🏷 DMI / SMBIOS / BIOS age
integrations.dmi.desc: Reads /sys/class/dmi/id/* for vendor / BIOS metadata. Catches BIOS > 3 years old (missing AGESA / ReBAR / PCIe Gen4 fixes) and classifies QEMU/VMware/Xen/VBox VMs.
integrations.iommu.title: 🔐 IOMMU groups + passthrough
integrations.iommu.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/iommu_groups/* + cmdline tokens. Catches IOMMU off, missing iommu=pt, and GPU sharing an IOMMU group with a root bridge (vfio-pci will refuse).
integrations.rlim.title: 🚦 Process rlimits (memlock/nofile)
integrations.rlim.desc: Reads /proc/self/limits + /proc/<llm-pid>/limits. Catches LimitMEMLOCK=8M (systemd default) which forces mmap+mlock fallback — first-token latency 10× worse on big quants.
integrations.virt.title: 🪐 Virtualization guest detection
integrations.virt.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/qemu_fw_cfg + /sys/hypervisor + /proc/cpuinfo flag 'hypervisor' + virtio bus. Classifies QEMU/KVM + NVIDIA passthrough — explains legitimate 'unknown' verdicts in RAPL/EDAC/IOMMU modules.
integrations.regul.title: ⚡ Voltage regulator framework
integrations.regul.desc: Reads /sys/class/regulator/regulator.*/{num_users,requested_microamps,suspend_*_state}. Catches orphan rails (current draw with no consumers) and drifted suspend-state policy.
integrations.codec.title: 🎵 ALSA per-codec deep dump
integrations.codec.desc: Parses /proc/asound/card*/codec#* (vendor/subsystem/power/pins) + cross-checks PCM hw_params. Catches NVIDIA HDA codec stuck at D0 with no stream open (blocks GPU PCIe ASPM L1).
integrations.devfreq.title: 🎚 devfreq DVFS scaling
integrations.devfreq.desc: Reads /sys/class/devfreq/* (GPU mem ctrl, DDR DVFS, NPU). Catches devices parked at min_freq under 'powersave', stuck at max, or stuck userspace governor.
integrations.mei.title: 🔒 Intel ME / MEI status
integrations.mei.desc: Reads /sys/class/mei/mei*/{fw_status,dev_state,fw_ver}. ME in recovery silently clamps CPU PL1/PL2 — looks like a thermal regression. Absent on AMD or VMs without ME passthrough.
integrations.memhp.title: 🧱 Memory hotplug blocks
integrations.memhp.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/memory/memory*/{state,valid_zones,removable}. Catches blocks stuck offline after failed balloon/CXL hot-remove (shrinks usable RAM silently).
integrations.taskaff.title: 🎯 Task affinity vs GPU NUMA
integrations.taskaff.desc: Reads /proc/<pid>/status Cpus_allowed_list for LLM processes + cross-checks GPU local_cpulist. Catches a systemd slice silently pinning llama-server to a wrong-NUMA CPU set (H2D copies cross QPI).
integrations.rfkill.title: 📶 rfkill + Bluetooth power
integrations.rfkill.desc: Reads /sys/class/rfkill/* + /sys/class/bluetooth/hci*. Catches hard-kill from a laptop lid sensor, leftover soft-block from suspend, and BT controller auto-suspend churn.
integrations.leds.title: 💡 /sys/class/leds inventory
integrations.leds.desc: Reads /sys/class/leds/*/{trigger,brightness}. Catches LED stuck at max with trigger=none, timer-flap LEDs draining battery, and orphan LED sysfs nodes.
integrations.binfmt.title: 🪐 binfmt_misc registrations
integrations.binfmt.desc: Reads /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc/{status,*}. Catches stale qemu-user-static F-flag pointers (docker buildx --platform breaks), duplicate magic registrations, and globally-disabled binfmt with buildx in use.
integrations.ptp.title: 🕰 PTP hardware clocks
integrations.ptp.desc: Reads /sys/class/ptp/ptp*/* + /dev/ptp* perms. Catches NICs with a PHC but no chrony/ptp4l consumer, max_adjustment=0 unsteerable PHCs, and root-only /dev/ptp*.
integrations.mei2.title: 🛡 MEI HDCP / PXP
integrations.mei2.desc: Reads /sys/class/mei_hdcp/* + /sys/class/mei_pxp/* (Intel ME content protection). Catches Intel Arc / Xe GPU where mei_pxp is disabled — HW-accel protected video decode silently falls back to SW.
integrations.eddmmc.title: 💾 EDD + MMC/eMMC wear
integrations.eddmmc.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/edd + /sys/bus/mmc/devices/*/life_time. Catches eMMC NAND wear-out imminent on embedded boot drives (life_time ≥ 0x0A).
integrations.devlink.title: 🔗 Kernel device-link framework
integrations.devlink.desc: Reads /sys/class/devlink/*/status. Catches supplier_not_ready links blocking consumer driver probe (often firmware-missing composite device).
integrations.procns.title: 📦 Per-PID namespaces + mountinfo
integrations.procns.desc: Reads /proc/<pid>/ns/* + mountinfo for LLM PIDs vs daemon. Catches CUDA PID in different mount/net-ns (NCCL fails) or /dev/nvidia* hidden by container bind.
integrations.idleres.title: 💤 cpuidle residency per-state
integrations.idleres.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cpuidle/state*/{time,usage,disable,above,below}. Catches POLL-dominant idle, C6 starvation, governor mispredict, asymmetric disabled states.
integrations.freqres.title: 📊 cpufreq time_in_state residency
integrations.freqres.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cpufreq/stats/{time_in_state,total_trans}. Catches CPU pinned at min/max, transition storm, asymmetric per-core boost cap.
integrations.efirt.title: 🧊 UEFI runtime-map
integrations.efirt.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/efi/runtime-map/<n>/{type,num_pages,...}. Catches runtime-map absent (kexec no efi=runtime) and large pinned EFI-RT regions.
integrations.devfreqevt.title: 📡 devfreq event PMU counters
integrations.devfreqevt.desc: Reads /sys/class/devfreq-event/event*/{name,enable_count}. Catches DRAM/memory-bus PMU disabled while simple_ondemand governor needs it (static freq fallback).
integrations.mtdflash.title: 💾 MTD flash (NOR/NAND)
integrations.mtdflash.desc: Reads /sys/class/mtd/mtd*/{name,size,erasesize,flags,bad_blocks,type} + /proc/mtd. Catches NOR bad-block growth, write-protect drift, and partitions that exist in /proc/mtd but not in sysfs.
integrations.spifw.title: 🔌 SPI + firmware loader
integrations.spifw.desc: Reads /sys/class/spi_master/* + /sys/class/firmware/<name>/loading + /sys/kernel/profiling. Catches firmware loads stuck in udev fallback (driver init blocked) and legacy oprofile sampling left enabled.
integrations.procsysauxv.title: 🧬 /proc/<pid> syscall + auxv + timerslack
integrations.procsysauxv.desc: Walks a sample of PIDs and reads syscall, wchan, auxv (AT_HWCAP / AT_PLATFORM) and timerslack_ns. Catches D-state I/O hangs, hwcap personality drift, and battery-hostile timer slack on laptops.
integrations.btfbpf.title: 🧠 BTF + BPF observability
integrations.btfbpf.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/btf/{vmlinux,*} + /sys/fs/bpf/. Catches kernels built without CONFIG_DEBUG_INFO_BTF (libbpf/bpftrace/Cilium silently degrade) and missing per-module BTF coverage.
integrations.esrt.title: 🛡 UEFI ESRT (fwupd inventory)
integrations.esrt.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/efi/esrt/entries/entry*/{fw_class,fw_version,lowest_supported_fw_version,last_attempt_status}. Surfaces silent fwupd capsule failures and stale firmware components below the vendor lowest_supported version.
integrations.vmallocinfo.title: 🗺 vmallocinfo (kernel virt space)
integrations.vmallocinfo.desc: Reads /proc/vmallocinfo (0400 root-only). Aggregates ioremap / vmalloc / vmap by caller, finds the largest single allocation, and detects fragmentation skew distinct from physical-memory accounting.
integrations.fdinfokinds.title: 🪀 fdinfo anon_inode kinds
integrations.fdinfokinds.desc: Walks /proc/*/fd/ classifying eventfd / timerfd / signalfd / eventpoll / io_uring / pidfd FDs and reads /proc/*/fdinfo/* for epoll watch counts and io_uring state. Flags unprivileged io_uring (CVE-prone) and runaway epoll watchers.
integrations.timerlist.title: ⏱ /proc/timer_list hrtimers
integrations.timerlist.desc: Reads /proc/timer_list (root) + /sys/devices/system/clocksource/clocksource0/. Surfaces NO_HZ idle failures, lost broadcast clock-event device, and hrtimer runaways; gracefully falls back to clocksource info when unprivileged.
integrations.pstore.title: 💥 pstore persistent crash logs
integrations.pstore.desc: Reads /proc/mounts + /sys/module/pstore/parameters/backend + /sys/fs/pstore/. Surfaces silently-stored panic / oops captures left behind from previous boots that no desktop UI flags.
integrations.mglru.title: 🌀 MGLRU memory reclaim
integrations.mglru.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/lru_gen/{enabled,min_ttl_ms} + /proc/swaps + /proc/pressure/memory. Catches MGLRU disabled under swap pressure and min_ttl_ms = 0 evicting hot inference pages prematurely.
integrations.fsspec.title: 🗄 ext4/xfs/f2fs per-FS counters
integrations.fsspec.desc: Reads /sys/fs/ext4/<dev>/errors_count + warning_count + first_error_time + /sys/fs/xfs/<dev>/stats + /sys/fs/f2fs/<dev>/gc_idle. Catches silent FS corruption (the earliest signal) and disabled f2fs background GC.
integrations.dtmem.title: 🧷 devicetree + memmap + vmcoreinfo
integrations.dtmem.desc: Reads /sys/firmware/devicetree/base + /sys/firmware/memmap/* + /sys/kernel/vmcoreinfo. Catches kdump prep broken (empty vmcoreinfo), kernel failing to import EFI memory map, and spurious DT on x86 (broken initramfs).
integrations.nvmem.title: 🔐 NVMEM device inventory
integrations.nvmem.desc: Walks /sys/bus/nvmem/devices/* (OTP, fuses, TPM NVRAM, BMC SDR, CMOS RAM). Flags world-writable nvmem blobs and world-readable OTP/fuse/TPM data files that reveal serials or keys.
integrations.damoncma.title: 📦 DAMON + CMA memory mgmt
integrations.damoncma.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/damon/admin + /sys/kernel/mm/cma/*. Catches CMA allocation failures (CUDA pinned memory breaks) and DAMON kdamond schemes hitting quota.
integrations.kpageflags.title: 🧱 /proc/kpageflags per-page
integrations.kpageflags.desc: Reads /proc/kpageflags (root, binary). Each 8-byte entry is one PFN's flag bitmap. Catches HWPOISON pages (ECC-flagged), excess unevictable pinning, and transparent-hugepage fragmentation.
integrations.procregistry.title: 📋 /proc kernel registry
integrations.procregistry.desc: Sweeps /proc/modules + /proc/devices + /proc/misc + /proc/filesystems + /proc/consoles. Catches (O)/(OE) taint modules, duplicate majors, missing GPU-stack filesystems, and dead consoles.
integrations.remoteproc.title: 🛰 remoteproc coprocessors
integrations.remoteproc.desc: Walks /sys/class/remoteproc/remoteproc<N>/{state,name,firmware,recovery,crash_count}. Surfaces crashed coprocessors (DSP, Falcon, NXP M4), recovery-disabled remoteprocs, and offline drivers waiting on firmware blobs.
integrations.uiogpio.title: 🔌 UIO + GPIO userland I/O
integrations.uiogpio.desc: Reads /sys/class/uio/uio<N> + /sys/class/gpio/{export,gpiochip<N>/}. Catches world-writable /dev/uio* (ring-0 RCE), orphan-exported legacy GPIO pins, and deprecated /sys/class/gpio interface in use.
integrations.devcd.title: 💀 devcoredump pending dumps
integrations.devcd.desc: Reads /sys/class/devcoredump/{disabled,devcd<N>/}. Pending GPU/wifi/NVMe driver dumps auto-evaporate in ~5min -- surfaces them while still collectible. Flags global-disable and missing CONFIG_DEV_COREDUMP.
integrations.cxldax.title: 🧮 CXL + DAX + nvdimm
integrations.cxldax.desc: Joins /sys/bus/cxl/devices + /sys/class/dax + /sys/bus/nd/devices. Catches CXL decoder errors, DAX size=0 misconfigs, unbound target_node, and pmem hardware unused for tiered memory.
integrations.usbrole.title: 🔁 USB role switch
integrations.usbrole.desc: Reads /sys/class/usb_role/*/role + /sys/class/typec/*/data_role. Catches USB-C ports stuck in device mode, mid-flip 'none' transitional state, and Type-C controller/switch desync on dual-role hardware.
integrations.pageidle.title: 🔍 Page-idle tracking
integrations.pageidle.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/mm/page_idle/bitmap + /proc/kpagecount + /proc/sys/vm/page-cluster. Confirms page-idle tracking is usable for working-set estimators (damon, CRIU); flags kernels without CONFIG_IDLE_PAGE_TRACKING.
integrations.edacdimm.title: 💎 EDAC per-DIMM CE/UE trend
integrations.edacdimm.desc: Drills /sys/devices/system/edac/mc/mc*/dimm*/{dimm_ce_count,dimm_ue_count,dimm_label,size_mb}. Surfaces the specific dimm_label of a failing DIMM (UE = catastrophic, CE >=1k = on borrowed time).
integrations.ataport.title: 💿 ATA + SATA links
integrations.ataport.desc: Reads /sys/class/ata_port/* + /sys/class/ata_link/*/{sata_spd,hw_sata_spd_limit} + /sys/class/ata_device/*/spdn_cnt. Catches links auto-renegotiated down (cable/PSU degradation), user-imposed speed caps, and excessive errors.
integrations.fwcfg.title: 🧱 QEMU fw_cfg blob inventory
integrations.fwcfg.desc: Walks /sys/firmware/qemu_fw_cfg/by_key/*/name. Classifies the QEMU guest as bare, opt-ROM (libvirt extras), or NVIDIA passthrough by parsing entry names. Goes deeper than virt_guest_detect which only checks presence.
integrations.uevent.title: ⚡ uevent helper script
integrations.uevent.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/uevent_helper + /proc/sys/kernel/hotplug. Flags non-empty values (kernel fork-execs the path as root on every uevent -- a known privilege-escalation surface, expected empty on systemd-udevd hosts).
integrations.dmientries.title: 🗂 DMI raw entries
integrations.dmientries.desc: Walks /sys/firmware/dmi/entries/*/<type>-<instance>. Classifies SMBIOS structures by type (DIMM, CPU, IPMI, Slot, etc.) from directory names without needing root. Flags IPMI BMC exposure, DIMM/slot mismatches, truncated tables.
integrations.tracingevt.title: 🪤 ftrace events per-subsystem
integrations.tracingevt.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/tracing/events/<subsys>/<evt>/enable. Catches GPU-tracing events left enabled after debug sessions (drm/nvidia/i915/nouveau), many-subsys debug stacks, and single stuck events.
integrations.pidlimits.title: 🧮 PID / threads / mmap limits
integrations.pidlimits.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/{pid_max,threads-max} + /proc/sys/vm/max_map_count + active PID count from /proc enumeration. Catches PID exhaustion, threads-max too low for CUDA, legacy 32k pid_max, and max_map_count too low for Electron/GPU.
integrations.sysctldev.title: 🎛 /proc/sys/dev knobs
integrations.sysctldev.desc: Reads /proc/sys/dev/{scsi/logging_level, i915/perf_stream_paranoid, hpet/max-user-freq, cdrom/autoclose}. Catches verbose SCSI logging flooding dmesg, paranoid Intel GPU profiling lock, low HPET poll rate, and disabled CD-ROM autoclose.
integrations.kexecprep.title: 💀 kdump / vmcoreinfo readiness
integrations.kexecprep.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/{notes,vmcoreinfo,kexec_loaded,kexec_crash_loaded,kexec_crash_size}. Confirms a GPU-wedge XID 79 / NVRM oops can actually be captured as a kdump (crashkernel reserved, vmcoreinfo populated).
integrations.fwattr.title: 🛠 BIOS firmware-attributes
integrations.fwattr.desc: Reads /sys/class/firmware-attributes/<vendor>/{attributes/*,pending_reboot}. On Dell/Lenovo/HP boxes catches ThermalMode=Quiet / IntelligentCooling caps and pending_reboot=1 (BIOS tweak not yet applied). KVM guests show 'unknown' as expected.
integrations.cpuiso.title: 🧱 CPU isolation / nohz_full / offline
integrations.cpuiso.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/{isolated,nohz_full,offline,possible} + parses /proc/cmdline isolcpus= and nohz_full= tokens. Catches stale isolation drift, half-tickless configs, RT-profile on a desktop, and unexpectedly offline CPUs.
integrations.dmaheap.title: 🎬 dma-buf heap allocators
integrations.dmaheap.desc: Walks /sys/class/dma_heap/* + /dev/dma_heap/*. Catches world-writable heap dev nodes, missing CMA heap on GPU hosts (zero-copy NVENC paths fall back to CPU copies), and root-only perms blocking unprivileged compositors.
integrations.abicompat.title: 🧊 Kernel ABI compatibility
integrations.abicompat.desc: Reads /proc/sys/abi/* + /proc/sys/kernel/ia32_emulation + /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc/status. Catches vsyscall32 disabled (Steam runtime broken), ia32_emulation off, legacy_va_layout forced, and binfmt_misc disabled.
integrations.v4l2media.title: 📹 V4L2 + media + CEC
integrations.v4l2media.desc: Walks /sys/class/{video4linux,media,cec}/* + cross-checks /dev/video*, /dev/media*, /dev/cec* perms. Catches capture devices root-only (blocking unprivileged OBS/Sunshine), driverless V4L2 entries, and missing media-controller topology.
integrations.miscchar.title: 🔌 Misc char-devices
integrations.miscchar.desc: Walks /proc/misc + /sys/class/misc/ and cross-checks /dev/{kvm,vhost-net,uinput,hpet,kmsg,nvram,rfkill,userfaultfd,fuse,tun,vfio} perms. Catches world-writable privileged minors, orphan /proc entries, and missing /dev/kvm on a KVM-loaded host.
integrations.sgx.title: 🔒 Intel SGX enclave
integrations.sgx.desc: Reads /proc/cpuinfo SGX flags + /sys/firmware/sgx_* + /sys/devices/system/cpu/sgx_* + /dev/sgx_{enclave,provision,vepc}. Catches SGX disabled in BIOS, world-writable provisioning node, and missing Flexible Launch Control.
integrations.lsmsub.title: 🛡 LSM subtree deep-dive
integrations.lsmsub.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/security/{apparmor,ima,safesetid,integrity,evm,landlock,yama}/ + parses lockdown mode. Goes deeper than security_posture by surfacing per-LSM stack consistency and AppArmor profile counts.
integrations.ipv4conf.title: 🌐 Per-iface IPv4 conf
integrations.ipv4conf.desc: Reads /proc/sys/net/ipv4/conf/<iface>/{rp_filter, accept_redirects, accept_source_route, send_redirects, log_martians, forwarding}. Catches LSRR-accept, no-source-validation, ICMP-redirect acceptance, and unexpected forwarding.
integrations.inputdev.title: ⌨ Input device wakeup posture
integrations.inputdev.desc: Walks /sys/class/input/event*/device/{name,inhibited,modalias} + traverses device tree for power/wakeup. Catches spurious wake sources (USB keyboards pulling box out of suspend), inhibited active devices, and orphan wakeup-enabled entries.
integrations.ipv6conf.title: 🌐 Per-iface IPv6 conf
integrations.ipv6conf.desc: Reads /proc/sys/net/ipv6/conf/<iface>/{accept_ra, autoconf, forwarding, accept_redirects, use_tempaddr, addr_gen_mode}. Catches RFC 4861-violating accept_ra+forwarding combo, tempaddr disabled (EUI-64 MAC leak), and ICMPv6 redirect acceptance.
integrations.wmibus.title: 🪛 WMI bus per-instance
integrations.wmibus.desc: Walks /sys/devices/virtual/wmi_bus/wmi_bus-*/{guid-*}/{instance_count,expensive,object_id,setable,driver,modalias}. Distinct from wmi_vendor_audit; catches expensive vendor WMI methods sitting unbound after a kernel upgrade.
integrations.numahmat.title: 🧠 NUMA HMAT/CDAT access matrix
integrations.numahmat.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/node/node*/access{0,1}/{read_bandwidth,read_latency,write_bandwidth,write_latency}. On multi-node hosts surfaces CPU↔mem bandwidth cliffs (≥3x access0/access1) and latency asymmetry — single-GPU hybrid P/E rigs benefit when wired correctly.
integrations.cputhrottle.title: 🔥 CPU thermal + RAPL throttle
integrations.cputhrottle.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/thermal_throttle/{core,package}_throttle_count and *_power_limit_count. Catches host-side CPU throttle events during llama.cpp prompt-prefill that idle the GPU waiting on tokens.
integrations.sriov.title: 🧩 PCI SR-IOV posture
integrations.sriov.desc: Walks /sys/bus/pci/devices/*/{sriov_totalvfs, sriov_numvfs, sriov_drivers_autoprobe}. Catches leftover active VFs (from prior virtualization), half-applied VFIO setups, and SR-IOV-capable hardware sitting unused.
integrations.cppc.title: 📊 ACPI CPPC perf envelope
integrations.cppc.desc: Reads /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/acpi_cppc/{highest_perf,nominal_perf,nominal_freq,lowest_freq}. Catches firmware-clamped perf envelope (no turbo headroom), frequency inversion from buggy BIOS tables, and kernel scaling_driver ignoring CPPC.
integrations.aerfleet.title: 🛰 PCIe AER fleet-wide
integrations.aerfleet.desc: Walks every /sys/bus/pci/devices/*/aer_dev_{correctable,fatal,nonfatal} — NVMe, NICs, USB xHCI, root ports, bridges. Catches drift months before user-visible failure on NVMe holding weights or NICs pushing inference traffic.
integrations.netcounters.title: 🌐 NIC error counters
integrations.netcounters.desc: Reads /sys/class/net/<iface>/statistics/{rx_crc_errors,tx_errors,rx_dropped,carrier_changes,…}. Catches bad cable / SFP, link flapping, or kernel-side socket-buffer drops on a NIC pushing inference traffic.
integrations.netstacking.title: 🔗 Net bond/bridge topology
integrations.netstacking.desc: Walks /sys/class/net/<iface>/{bonding,bridge,master,lower_*,upper_*} for kernel-level drift in bond/bridge stacking. Catches a NetworkManager reload that left a bond with one dead slave, or a bridge with STP-off and ≥2 real ports.
integrations.procmaps.title: 🧠 /proc/pid/maps anomaly scan
integrations.procmaps.desc: Scans every readable /proc/<pid>/maps for rwx VMAs, anonymous executable segments, /memfd:… executable backings, and (deleted) executable files. Whitelists known JIT engines (V8, Qt-QML, JVM, Mono, SwiftShader, Mesa-LLVM).
integrations.softnet.title: 📊 Per-CPU softirq packet health
integrations.softnet.desc: Reads /proc/net/softnet_stat — per-CPU softirq drops, NAPI time_squeezes, cpu_collisions. Catches softirq-level packet loss invisible to ethtool / `ip -s` (the silent killer behind ssh micro-stalls during inference batches).
integrations.routes.title: 🗺 Routing-table sanity
integrations.routes.desc: Reads /proc/net/route + /proc/net/ipv6_route. Catches NetworkManager reload that dropped the default gw, a container that stole the host default, and VPN-client bypass leaks (50+ /32 host routes).
integrations.fbvtcon.title: 🖼 Framebuffer / vtconsole handoff
integrations.fbvtcon.desc: Walks /proc/fb + /sys/class/graphics/fb*/ + /sys/class/vtconsole/. Catches efifb / simpledrm still owning the framebuffer after nvidia-drm loaded — top cause of black-screen-after-resume on Ampere desktops.
integrations.schedtune.title: 🎚 Scheduler tunable safety
integrations.schedtune.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/sched_*. Flags unbounded RT runtime (kernel hang risk), autogroup-off on desktop session, low rt_runtime/rt_period ratio, and schedstats-off (other CFS audits go diagnostic-blind).
integrations.arp.title: 📡 ARP / neighbor cache health
integrations.arp.desc: Reads /proc/net/arp + /proc/net/stat/arp_cache + neigh/gc_thresh*. Catches NAS/router/PXE-host flapping that turns into INCOMPLETE ARP entries — the silent cause behind 'why is my NFS mount stalling for 30s'.
integrations.snmp6.title: 🌍 IPv6 ICMP / ND / MLD counters
integrations.snmp6.desc: Reads /proc/net/snmp6. Catches IPv6-side errors that never hit IPv4 SNMP — checksum failures, ND-poisoning storms, unsolicited RA / NA traffic, IPv6 header pathology.
integrations.btrfs.title: 💽 btrfs chunk allocator pressure
integrations.btrfs.desc: Walks /sys/fs/btrfs/<uuid>/allocation/{data,metadata,system}/<profile>/. Catches the #1 btrfs footgun: metadata chunks full while data chunks have room — every write fails with ENOSPC but df shows plenty free.
integrations.proccaps.title: 🛡 Capability / hardening posture
integrations.proccaps.desc: Walks /proc/<pid>/status, decodes CapEff/CapBnd/CapAmb bitmaps. Catches a daemon (Ollama, Plex, …) holding CAP_SYS_ADMIN / CAP_NET_ADMIN as a non-root user — confused-deputy escalation surface.
integrations.xhci.title: 🔌 USB 3 / USB 2 companion
integrations.xhci.desc: Walks /sys/bus/usb/devices/usb*/. Catches silent USB 3 → USB 2 fallback (broken xHCI handoff, worn cable) that tanks NVMe-over-USB and webcam bandwidth.
integrations.bpf.title: 🐝 BPF program inventory
integrations.bpf.desc: Walks /sys/fs/bpf/ + /proc/<pid>/fdinfo for prog_id/map_id refs. Catches forgotten bpftrace pins, runaway systemd-oomd churn, and orphan Cilium maps leaking memory.
integrations.cgroupio.title: 📊 cgroup IO pressure
integrations.cgroupio.desc: Walks /sys/fs/cgroup/**/io.stat + io.pressure. Identifies which cgroup is hogging the NVMe — the top homelab debug for 'why is everything stuttering'.
integrations.thermaltrip.title: 🌡 Thermal trip drift
integrations.thermaltrip.desc: Walks /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone*/. Catches drifted trip thresholds (firmware reset, EC quirk), hysteresis=0 fan oscillation, and CPU zones without passive throttling enabled.
integrations.sysrq.title: 🚨 SysRq + kexec hardening
integrations.sysrq.desc: Reads /proc/sys/kernel/sysrq + kexec_load_disabled. Catches a fully-enabled SysRq channel combined with kexec_load=allowed (boot arbitrary kernel without reboot) and risky bits like SAK/dump being exposed.
integrations.cpudmaqos.title: 🔋 CPU PM-QoS idle wattage
integrations.cpudmaqos.desc: Walks /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/power/pm_qos_resume_latency_us and scans /proc/<pid>/fd for /dev/cpu_dma_latency holders. Directly answers 'why is idle wattage 90W not 35W' — a stale PulseAudio/Steam handle pinning PM-QoS=0 blocks deep idle.
integrations.rcu.title: ⚙ RCU expedited / isolation
integrations.rcu.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/rcu_expedited + cpu/isolated + /proc/cmdline. Catches rcu_expedited=1 firing IPIs on isolated cores (defeats isolation), short stall timeout (false-positive splats), and half-finished rcu_nocbs RT setup.
integrations.pageownerfrag.title: 🧩 Page fragmentation index
integrations.pageownerfrag.desc: Reads /sys/kernel/debug/extfrag/{extfrag,unusable}_index — the normalized fragmentation metric the kernel reclaimer actually uses. Catches THP collapse stalls and GPU pinned-alloc failures that don't show in /proc/buddyinfo.
integrations.blockintegrity.title: 🛡 T10-PI block integrity
integrations.blockintegrity.desc: Reads /sys/block/*/integrity/{format,read_verify,write_generate}. Catches enterprise NVMe / SAS drives with PI hardware armed but kernel-side checking disabled — silent corruption shield off.
integrations.clksummary.title: ⏱ Common-clock framework state
integrations.clksummary.desc: Parses /sys/kernel/debug/clk/clk_summary. Reveals clocks left running with no consumer (orphan clocks = idle-power leak) and prepare/enable drift.
integrations.nfsd.title: 📂 NFS server health
integrations.nfsd.desc: Reads /proc/fs/nfsd/{threads,pool_stats,reply_cache_stats}. Catches NFS server thread-pool starvation and Duplicate Reply Cache overflow — silent NAS write-throughput killers.
integrations.dridebugfs.title: 🎮 DRM client / GEM handles
integrations.dridebugfs.desc: Walks /sys/kernel/debug/dri/*/{clients,gem_names}. Catches GEM-handle leaks (renderer crashed, handles never freed) and zombie DRM clients holding contexts after PID is gone.
integrations.suspend.title: 💤 S3 / S2idle suspend health
integrations.suspend.desc: Reads /sys/power/suspend_stats/{success,fail,failed_*,last_failed_dev,errno,step}. Tells you whether suspend ever worked and exactly which device/step broke it last.
integrations.loopdev.title: 🪢 Loop device backing files
integrations.loopdev.desc: Walks /sys/block/loop*/loop/backing_file. Catches the classic 'disk space won't free' mystery — a loop holding a deleted (unlinked) backing file pinned in the kernel.
integrations.modparams.title: 🧬 Kernel module param drift
integrations.modparams.desc: Walks /sys/module/{nvme,usbcore,zswap,ksm,xhci_hcd,i915,amdgpu}/parameters/. Surfaces a modprobe.d edit nobody documented — security or perf knobs drifted from kernel defaults.
integrations.ttyserial.title: 🔌 TTY / serial console
integrations.ttyserial.desc: Walks /sys/class/tty/{console,ttyUSB*,ttyACM*}. Catches a stuck console=ttyS0 sending boot logs to a serial port with no cable, USB-serial dongles in error state, and racing names on reboot.
integrations.dyndbg.title: 🐞 Kernel dyndbg call-sites
